name: Lake Ripley Lanes
about: Albatross Alley & Lake Ripley Lanes is a combined bowling alley and golf simulator facility located in Cambridge, Wisconsin. The venue operates with two dedicated golf simulator rooms and offers a comfortable atmosphere suitable for various skill levels, from beginners looking for casual play to those aiming to improve their game. It is positioned as a one-of-a-kind entertainment destination that merges traditional bowling with modern golf technology, providing indoor activities for individuals, families, and groups year-round.
why_golfers_like_it: Immersive Trackman simulator technology allowing play on world's most iconic courses
Dedicated golf simulator rooms for focused practice without distractions
Flexible booking system available online for convenient tee time scheduling
Indoor facility offering year-round play regardless of weather conditions
Supportive atmosphere suitable for both casual players and serious practice sessions

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen available for food service

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor technology with dual radar and camera system

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify if they provide club rentals, so bringing your own clubs is recommended.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site kitchen for food service, but does not mention allowing outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typical simulator sessions range from 1-2 hours depending on pace of play and number of players per bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly with a welcoming atmosphere suitable for children and offers activities for all ages.
